name: Honey Cinnamon Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the digestives or graham crackers in a food processor and grind them into crumbs. Add the melted butter and mix briefly until combined. Press the mixture firmly into a 25cm flan dish. Refrigerate until set.
2. In a bowl, beat the eggs lightly with the Quark. Gradually add the sugar, honey, and lemon rind. Pour this mixture over the crust and sprinkle generously with cinnamon.
3. Bake in a preheated oven at 180°C for 50 minutes, or until firm.
Serve at room temperature or chilled.
